title: The Wealth of Nations
author: Adam Smith
content: “The division of labour... is the great cause of the increase of public opulence.”
action: Specialize for efficiency but guard against dependency.

title: Small Is Beautiful
author: E.F. Schumacher
content: “Any intelligent fool can make things bigger, more complex, and more violent. It takes a touch of genius—and a lot of courage—to move in the opposite direction.”
action: Simplify systems to reduce failure risk.

title: Skin in the Game
author: Nassim Nicholas Taleb
content: “You cannot make a decision for someone else if you do not bear the consequences.”
action: Align incentives so decision-makers share consequences.

title: The Theory of the Leisure Class
author: Thorstein Veblen
content: “Conspicuous consumption... serves as a signal of high-level system capability.”
